title: K Sudhakaran’s praise for Cong’s Venugopal stirs row
description: The vocal remarks of former Kerala Pradesh Congress Committee (KPCC) chief and Kannur MP K Sudhakaran extolling KC Venugopal, the party’s general secretary (organisation), and calling for the latter to lead the party in the state have once again stirred the possibility of internal rumblings about choices for the chief minister’s post and invited stern comments from several party leaders
